name: Tagging Sparks
descrip: Cast a charm on your opponent.
outcome: Electric arcs showily trail up [AttackerName]'s horns before discharging through the air in wild patterns, glowing in bright neon colors as they hit [TargetName] and trail down caressingly over [TargetHisOrHer] frame in a tingly static wave, flooding [TargetHisOrHer] entire body with raw voltaic arousal!
miss: Electric arcs showily trail up [AttackerName]'s horns before discharging through the air in wild patterns, but [TargetName] manages to evade the brightly colored magic attack!
statusOutcome: |f|CallCombatEventAndScene|/|LivewireCombatEvent|/|RutTick|n|Amid the ecstasy of the searing magical surge, an acute numbness starts to seep through [TargetName]'s body, intermixed with a needy base urge for sex!
